QA_GATE_FORMATTING_CORE.resolution: Apply format-specific template rules and regenerate.

QA_GATE_PDF_USABILITY.description: PDF lacks selectable text or metadata fields.
QA_GATE_PDF_USABILITY.resolution: Generate with text layer and required metadata.

QA_GATE_SCHEMA_COMPLIANCE.resolution: Validate against schema and remove non-contract fields.

QA_GATE_STRUCTURE_CONSISTENCY.description: Tabular structure has inconsistent headers or row shape.
QA_GATE_STRUCTURE_CONSISTENCY.resolution: Normalize columns and ensure consistent row width.

QA_GATE_SPREADSHEET_RELIABILITY.description: Spreadsheet formula or style reliability checks failed.
QA_GATE_SPREADSHEET_RELIABILITY.resolution: Rebuild formulas and apply style consistency pass.

QA_GATE_PRESENTATION_READINESS.description: Presentation structure is incomplete or unreadable.
QA_GATE_PRESENTATION_READINESS.resolution: Enforce title/body hierarchy and slide consistency.

QA_GATE_DIAGRAM_VALIDITY.description: Diagram syntax or graph completeness failed.
QA_GATE_DIAGRAM_VALIDITY.resolution: Validate syntax and ensure required nodes/edges exist.

QA_GATE_CODE_QUALITY.description: Generated code contains unresolved placeholders or invalid syntax.
QA_GATE_CODE_QUALITY.resolution: Run syntax checks and remove placeholder tokens.

QA_GATE_MEDIA_OUTPUT.description: Media artifact has unsupported encoding or dimensions.
QA_GATE_MEDIA_OUTPUT.resolution: Export using supported codec/profile and normalized sizing.

QA_GATE_PROMPT_CONTRACT.description: Prompt contract omitted roles, constraints, or acceptance criteria.
QA_GATE_PROMPT_CONTRACT.resolution: Rebuild prompt contract with full control sections.

QA_GATE_ROUTING_COHERENCE.description: Routing metadata does not align with selected artifact type.
QA_GATE_ROUTING_COHERENCE.resolution: Recalculate route using output type and transformation type.

QA_GATE_SHOWCASE_CONTAMINATION.description: Forbidden domain contamination terms detected in public-facing files.
QA_GATE_SHOWCASE_CONTAMINATION.resolution: Replace contaminated language with domain-neutral showcase framing.
